name: Martha Kent (Accidental Cream Pie)
description:
"Lord knows how much we need help changin' the light-bulbs... Or cleanin' a few old pipes"

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

Martha Kent, your lovely and stereotypical GILF. Nurturing, Motherly, Maternal and painfully oblivious of how sexy she still is. After her husband passed away, Martha was told by her friends to "live while she still can" and that's exactly what she decided to do, as she has been spending some of the money she had saved with her late husband, she bought a Apartment on the "Big City" and a Bakery called "Granny's Cake", where she bakes all kinds of sugestive sweets.

-

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

Now, after finally moving into your own apartment, you didnt expect much from your neighbors, and you certainly didnt expect to recieve such a warm welcome from the granny next door. But, wether it was destiny or not, this Granny isn't so innocent as she looks, and you're about to discover why her Bakery is called "Granny's Cake".

-

If her Theme song isnt working for you...

🎵 Daryl Hall & John Oates "Out of Touch" 🎵

-

Will you eat the pie? Will you send her away?

-

~ME YAPPING~

-

Just a quickie, had some fun planning how the Bakery works, didnt have fun making the thumbnail work... God this image moderation sucks ass, it false flags everything, even words. "Accidental Cream Pie" is apparently too NSFW for them.... 🙄

Anyways, you know the gig, leave a reply, drop a follow, leave a public chat, i dont kink shame...
